AI strategy for leaders who value precision over noise.

Twenty-five years. Four institutions. One focus: helping women executives make AI decisions with confidence and clarity.

Track Record

25

Years in technology leadership, from DoD to Fortune 50

$1B+

Platform scale managed as CTO, Microsoft Global Partner Solutions

NYSE

Independent Director, IDEX Corporation. Governance at scale.

50

Top 50 Black Business Women in the U.S.

Services

Board AI Fluency

Private sessions for boards and executive committees. Translate technical risk into governance language.

Executive Coaching

One-on-one partnership for women navigating AI adoption. Build confidence through judgment, not jargon.

Implementation Sprints

Hands-on 2-4 week engagements. Move from strategy to execution with real tools and real teams.

Leadership Circle

Small cohort of women leaders navigating AI together. Monthly sessions, peer support, shared progress.
